name: @concordvoice/media-plane
description: Concord Voice Media Plane - WebRTC SFU for voice routing
author: Concord Voice Team
//overrides_rationale: node-domexception@1.0.0 is deprecated upstream and has no replacement version. fetch-blob@3.x and 4.x both still declare it as a hard dep. We override to a local stub that re-exports globalThis.DOMException (native in Node 18+). Remove this override + the stubs/ directory once mediasoup ships a release pulling node-fetch@^4 stable, OR fetch-blob ships a version that drops the polyfill dep entirely.
//overrides_security: ws@^8.21.0 closes GHSA-96hv-2xvq-fx4p (memory-exhaustion DoS; transitive via socket.io->engine.io->ws, vulnerable <8.21.0). @babel/core@^7.29.7 closes GHSA-4x5r-pxfx-6jf8 (arbitrary file read via sourceMappingURL; transitive via @vitest/coverage-istanbul). Both are forced because the intermediates pin older ranges. Drop each override once the parent pulls a patched version natively.
